quotes.quote: What I cannot create, I do not understand.
quotes.author: Richard Feynman

quotes.quote: God does not play dice with the universe.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: The most incomprehensible thing about the universe is that it is comprehensible.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: I think I can safely say that nobody understands quantum mechanics.
quotes.author: Richard Feynman

quotes.quote: Anyone who is not shocked by quantum theory has not understood it.
quotes.author: Niels Bohr

quotes.quote: No problem can be solved from the same level of consciousness that created it.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.quote: A physical theory is the more impressive the greater the simplicity of its premises.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein
